metadata.description: Code quality, architecture enforcement, and premium design patterns for Claude Code.

plugins.name: composure
plugins.description: Code quality enforcement plugin — decomposition hooks, architecture skills, severity-tracked task queue

plugins.name: design-forge
plugins.description: Premium web design patterns — 33 production components, 10 reference guides, canvas presets, animation recipes, 3D integration, accessibility, AI design research

plugins.name: sentinel
plugins.description: Security scanning plugin — secret detection hooks, insecure pattern blocking, dependency CVE auditing, Semgrep integration, HTTP header analysis

plugins.name: testbench
plugins.description: Test generation and quality plugin — framework-aware templates, coverage nudging, testing principles reference docs for Vitest, Jest, Playwright, pytest

plugins.name: shipyard
plugins.description: CI/CD pipeline plugin — GitHub Actions workflows, Docker best practices, deployment principles, multi-stage Dockerfile templates, zero-downtime strategies
